analyses.summary: Jessica pitched 3 Java developer candidates to Sarah. Client was impressed with candidate #2's AWS experience. Interview scheduled for Monday. Follow-up to send portfolio links.

Carlos discussed warehouse staffing needs. Client expressed concern about rates being higher than previous vendor. Carlos didn't effectively address the value prop. Needs coaching on objection handling.
Maria closed the RN placement and expanded the relationship. James confirmed budget for 2 more hires. Fee negotiated to 22% — $4K above standard. Textbook call.
Cold call went poorly. Ryan didn't identify the decision maker before calling, stumbled on the opening, and prospect ended the call. Training recommended on cold call fundamentals.

highlights: Strong technical understanding of biotech roles
flags: Could have pushed harder on exclusivity
analyses.summary: Ana had a productive call with Dr. Liu about 4 specialized lab tech positions. Discussed specific certifications needed (ASCP, AMT). Proposal sent with staffing agreement. Follow-up Thursday.
